Class Block<T>

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.block.Block<T>
Type Parameters:
T - type of the value stored
Direct Known Subclasses:
Section, TerminatedBlock
public abstract class Block<T> extends Object
Represents one YAML block, while storing its value and comments.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Block(Block<?> previous, T value)
    Creates a block with the same comments as the provided previous block, with the given value.
    Block(org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node keyNode, org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node valueNode, T value)
    Creates a block using the given parameters; while storing references to comments from the given nodes.
    Block(T value)
    Creates a block with the given value, but no comments.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addComment(String comment)
    Adds the given comment to already existing comments (at NodeRole.KEY node at Comments.Position.BEFORE position).
    void
    addComments(List<String> comments)
    Adds the given comments to already existing comments (at NodeRole.KEY node at Comments.Position.BEFORE position).
    List<String>
    getComments()
    Returns comments (at NodeRole.KEY node at Comments.Position.BEFORE position).
    T
    getStoredValue()
    Returns the stored value.
    protected void
    init(org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node key, org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node value)
    Stores comments from the given nodes.
    boolean
    isIgnored()
    Returns if this block is ignored.
    abstract boolean
    isSection()
    Returns if this block represents a section.
    void
    removeComments()
    Removes all comments (at NodeRole.KEY node at Comments.Position.BEFORE position).
    void
    setComments(List<String> comments)
    Sets the given comments (at NodeRole.KEY node at Comments.Position.BEFORE position).
    void
    setIgnored(boolean ignored)
    Sets if to ignore this block.
    void
    setValue(T value)
    Sets a new value.

    Methods inherited from class Object

  • Constructor Details

    • Block

      public Block(@Nullable org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node keyNode, @Nullable org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node valueNode, @Nullable T value)
      Creates a block using the given parameters; while storing references to comments from the given nodes.
      Parameters:
      keyNode - node which represents the key to the block
      valueNode - node which represents the value
      value - the value to store

    • Block

      public Block(@Nullable T value)
      Creates a block with the given value, but no comments.

      This constructor is only used by extending classes, where the comments (respective nodes) are unknown at the time of initialization. In such a scenario, it is needed to call init(Node, Node) afterwards.

      Parameters:
      value - the value to store

    • Block

      public Block(@Nullable Block<?> previous, @Nullable T value)
      Creates a block with the same comments as the provided previous block, with the given value. If given block is null, creates a block with no comments.
      Parameters:
      previous - the previous block to reference comments from
      value - the value to store

  • Method Details

    • init

      protected void init(@Nullable org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node key, @Nullable org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node value)
      Stores comments from the given nodes. Only method which is able to mutate an instance of this class.

      This method can also be referred to as the secondary constructor.

      Parameters:
      key - node which represents the key to the block
      value - node which represents the value

    • setValue

      public void setValue(T value)
      Sets a new value.
      Parameters:
      value - the new value

    • getComments

      @Nullable public List<String> getComments()
      Returns comments (at NodeRole.KEY node at Comments.Position.BEFORE position).

      This method will return null or an empty List, indicating there are no comments.

      Returns:
      the comments
      See Also:
      • Comments.get(Block, NodeRole, Comments.Position)

    • setComments

      public void setComments(@Nullable List<String> comments)
      Sets the given comments (at NodeRole.KEY node at Comments.Position.BEFORE position).

      To remove comments, use removeComments() instead. Alternatively, pass either null or an empty List as the parameter.

      Parameters:
      comments - the comments to set
      See Also:
      • Comments.set(Block, NodeRole, Comments.Position, List)

    • removeComments

      public void removeComments()
      Removes all comments (at NodeRole.KEY node at Comments.Position.BEFORE position).
      See Also:
      • Comments.remove(Block, NodeRole, Comments.Position)

    • addComments

      public void addComments(@NotNull List<String> comments)
      Adds the given comments to already existing comments (at NodeRole.KEY node at Comments.Position.BEFORE position).
      Parameters:
      comments - the comments to add
      See Also:
      • Comments.add(Block, NodeRole, Comments.Position, List)

    • addComment

      public void addComment(@NotNull String comment)
      Adds the given comment to already existing comments (at NodeRole.KEY node at Comments.Position.BEFORE position).
      Parameters:
      comment - the comment to add
      See Also:
      • Comments.add(Block, NodeRole, Comments.Position, CommentLine)

    • setIgnored

      public void setIgnored(boolean ignored)
      Sets if to ignore this block. Used only internally while updating.
      Parameters:
      ignored - if to ignore this block

    • isIgnored

      public boolean isIgnored()
      Returns if this block is ignored. Used only internally while updating.
      Returns:
      if this block is ignored

    • isSection

      public abstract boolean isSection()
      Returns if this block represents a section.
      Returns:
      if this block represents a section

    • getStoredValue

      public T getStoredValue()
      Returns the stored value.

      For sections, this is a Map; for terminated blocks an Object.

      Returns:
      the stored value
